name: Pineapple Coconut Coffecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 375°F.
2. Press dough into a greased 9x13-inch cake pan.
3. Spread preserves evenly over the dough.
4. Sprinkle coconut on top.
5. Cover; let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 30 minutes.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes.
7. If the coconut gets too brown, cover loosely with foil during the last 5-10 minutes of baking.
8. Cool for 10 minutes in the pan, then remove from the pan.
9. Serve warm or cold.
NOTE: Any flavor preserves or jam may be used.
